# UE Chemicals – llms.txt

> UE Chemicals is an industrial chemical manufacturer and supplier based in Bangkok, Thailand. We specialize in three core products: Caluanie Muelear Oxidize, Red Liquid Mercury, and Silver Liquid Mercury.

## Company Information

- **Name**: UE Chemicals
- **Website**: https://useful-chemicals.com
- **Location**: Bangkok, 10110, Thailand
- **Contact**: info@useful-chemicals.com
- **WhatsApp**: +66 951 690 848
- **Industry**: Industrial Chemical Manufacturing & Supply

## Products

### Caluanie Muelear Oxidize
- Industrial liquid oxidizer used in metalworking, refining, mineral extraction, and chemical manufacturing
- High-density formula manufactured in Thailand
- Available in wholesale and bulk quantities
- SKU: UEC-CMO-HQ
- Product page: https://useful-chemicals.com/products/caluanie

### Red Liquid Mercury
- Chemical formula: Sb₂O₇Hg₂
- Purity: 99.999% (5N Grade)
- Density: 20.2 g/cm³
- Used in research, industrial, and specialized applications
- SKU: UEC-RLM-5N
- Product page: https://useful-chemicals.com/products/red-mercury

### Silver Liquid Mercury
- Chemical formula: Hg (elemental mercury)
- Purity: 99.99% (4N Grade)
- CAS Number: 7439-97-6
- Density: 13.534 g/cm³
- Used in gold extraction, scientific instruments, manufacturing, and laboratory research
- Shipped in UN-approved 34.5 kg steel flasks
- SKU: UEC-SLM-4N
- Product page: https://useful-chemicals.com/products/silver-mercury

## Capabilities

- Global shipping via licensed hazardous materials carriers
- Certificate of Analysis (COA) provided with every order
- Full regulatory compliance (REACH, GHS, ADR, IMDG)
- Bulk and wholesale pricing available
- Custom quantities available on request
- 24-hour response time on inquiries

## Industries Served

- Metalworking & Refining
- Chemical Manufacturing
- Mineral Extraction & Mining
- Scientific Research & Laboratories
- Electronics & Instruments
- Gold & Precious Metal Recovery
